name: Mail Jeevas
description:
__Height:__ 168cm (5'6")

Matt is a cohort of [Mello's](https://anilist.co/character/463/). He does some espionage work for him and is an accomplice in [Takada's](https://anilist.co/character/3765/) kidnapping. He follows orders without question, usually smoking a cigarette as he does. Not much else is known about him, other than he is a former resident of [Wammy's](https://anilist.co/character/2179/) orphanage. 

Matt likes video games, but dislikes going out, and Matt was behind Mello and [Near](https://anilist.co/character/464/) to succeed [L](https://anilist.co/character/71/). It was said that during his time in Wammy's orphanage he and Mello were very close friends and liked to cause trouble. Also it was reported that his calm demeanor and laid back attitude was the reason why he is third in line to be L. His lack of motivation and drive the only thing holding him back from being first. His intelligence matching even surpassing Mello and Nears'.
